productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Alvord 9 Grey Sports Shoes
description: Designed for those who love that rugged, uneven terrain, the nike Air Alvord 9  running shoe offers a supportive Fit and durable traction, while the nike Air technology provides plush cushioning offering a comfortable ride.UpperHeavily meshed upper with strategically placed overlays for lightweight, breathable comfortLacing system with laces attached to the overlays and cinch around the foot for a snug fit and to lock the foot in placeCushioned tongue and collar for snug comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionNike Air unit in the heel for soft, resilient cushioningFirm rubber shank in the midfoot for excellent support offering a stable, plush rideOutsoleTPR outsole with deep flex grooves along the length and width to offer an efficient strideAggresive ground piping lugs for multi-surface tractionCarbon Rubber at the heel and toe for enhanced durability in high-wear areasshoe careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
